debug_info.goal:
U : Type
⊢ ctble U ↔ ∃ f, one_to_one f

proof:
by
  rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨A, hA⟩
    obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := (equinum_iff_inverse_pair A U).mp hA
    exists (λ u => (g u).val)
    intro u1 u2 heq
    have h1 : g u1 = g u2 := Subtype.ext heq
    have h2 : f (g u1) = f (g u2) := congr_arg f h1
    have h3 : u1 = f (g u1) := (congr_fun hfg u1).symm
    have h4 : u2 = f (g u2) := (congr_fun hfg u2).symm
    exact h3.trans (h2.trans h4.symm)
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    let A : Set Nat := range f
    exists A
    apply (equinum_iff_inverse_pair A U).mpr
    let g' : U → A := λ u => ⟨f u, ⟨u, rfl⟩⟩
    let f' : A → U := λ a => Classical.choose a.property
    exists f', g'
    constructor
    · funext u
      dsimp [f', g']
      apply hf
      exact Classical.choose_spec (g' u).property
    · funext a
      dsimp [f', g']
      apply Subtype.ext
      exact Classical.choose_spec a.property
successful_attempts:
by

  apply Iff.intro

    have h4 : u2 = f (g u2) := (congr_fun hfg u2).symm
    exact h3.trans (h2.trans h4.symm)
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    let A : Set Nat := range f

    let g' : U → A := λ u => ⟨f u, ⟨u, rfl⟩⟩
